query: Count all 1 km grid cells in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Kristiansand municipality

4.description: reduce storm-flood polygons to Kristiansand extent (intersect municipality geometry)

5.description: find grid cells that intersect reduced storm-flood polygons

6.description: count distinct 1km grid cells that intersect the 200-year storm-flood areas in Kristiansand municipality

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, objid, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE omrade IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT objid, objtype, lokalid, ssbid1000m, shape_area, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 1
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom"
-- right_geom: "omrade"
